title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 16. INSURE LOUISIANA INCENTIVE PROGRAM

PART I. INSURE LOUISIANA INCENTIVE PROGRAM

§2361. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known as the "Insure Louisiana Incentive Program" and may be referred to as the "program".

            Acts 2007, No. 447, §1, eff. July 11, 2007; Redesignated from R.S. 22:3301 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2022, No. 754, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 16.  INSURE LOUISIANA INCENTIVE PROGRAM
PART I.  INSURE LOUISIANA INCENTIVE PROGRAM
§2361.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as the "Insure Louisiana Incentive Program" and may
be referred to as the "program".
Acts 2007, No. 447, §1, eff. July 11, 2007; Redesignated from R.S. 22:3301 by Acts
2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2022, No. 754, §1.
